xEnglish: GCA / Go China Access is shaping the token around GCA AI Quant Access: a non-custodial product path for China-facing Web3 research and quant risk workflows.

Planned modules: China Narrative Radar, Liquidation Replay, risk-warning credits, Backtest Lab, ENTRY_READY Review, Position Size Calculator, GCA Member Workspace, research notes, training, and support review.
Live foundation: public account intake, read-only wallet balance verification, eligible 100 credits ledger records, and eligible GCA Member ledger records.
Release boundary: trading-related tools still require risk controls, simulation/testnet checks, and manual review before broader use.
Official links first. No price or return claim.
xChinese: GCA / Go China Access 正在围绕 GCA AI Quant Access 建设：面向中国 Web3 研究和量化风控流程的非托管产品路径。
规划模块：China Narrative Radar、爆仓复盘、风险预警 credits、Backtest Lab、ENTRY_READY Review、仓位计算器、GCA Member Workspace、研究笔记、训练和支持审核。
已上线基础：公开账户入口、只读钱包余额验证、符合条件的 100 credits 账本记录、符合条件的 GCA Member 账本记录。
上线边界：交易相关工具仍需要风控、模拟盘/测试网检查和人工审核后再扩大使用。
先核对官方链接。不做价格或收益承诺。
telegram: GCA AI Quant Access product direction: China-facing Web3 research, wallet verification, utility credits, member review, liquidation replay, backtests, ENTRY_READY review, position sizing, training, and support workflows.
Live foundation: account intake, read-only wallet verification, eligible credits ledger, and eligible GCA Member ledger records. Trading-related modules remain release-gated.
nextPublishAction.visualTheme: Red GCA mark beside a GCA AI Quant Access module map, wallet verification, credits, member review, and risk tools.
nextPublishAction.claimBoundary: Product-utility introduction only; no price, return, audit-completion, BaseScan approval, wallet-vendor approval, listing, self-service trading, automatic token benefit, or market-prediction claim.

operatorChecklist: Open the official X profile only: https://x.com/GCAAIGoChina
Confirm the post link points to the official website and not a copied or shortened link.
Confirm the network wording stays Base Mainnet / chainId 8453.
Confirm the official market route remains GCA/USDT.
Confirm the text does not claim third-party audit completion.
Confirm the text does not claim BaseScan token profile approval.
Confirm the text does not make price, return, listing, or market-prediction claims.
After publishing, record the new post URL in announcements.json and community.json before the next site update.

postPublishLedgerUpdate.action: Add the published X post URL, date, channel, and message to publishedPosts.
Update latestPostUrl and safeAnnouncement if the post should become a community reference.
Keep announcementHub.latestPostUrl aligned when the latest public X post changes.
No token-list change is required unless official links, route, or public status changes.

doNotPublish: return promises, price targets, market predictions, or unsupported investment-style claims
third-party audit completion before an independent report is public
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
security-vendor approval before the vendor confirms it
LP lock, reserve lock, buyback, or price-support claim before evidence exists
any request for private keys, seed phrases, exchange API secrets, or wallet approvals
